methodsAttempted.query: QS 141-160 official university AI tools discovery
methodsAttempted.notes: Firecrawl search, targeted HTTP fetches, and official university AI/IT service pages were used across QS141-160.

artifacts.summary: QS141-160 AI tools crawl found official tool-level records for USC, Stockholm, Groningen, Liverpool, Cape Town, Vienna, Exeter, Geneva, Barcelona, Michigan State, Ghent, WashU, and York. UTM, Wageningen, Basel, Hanyang, Nagoya, Chalmers, and Montreal were not expanded.

artifacts.title: QS141-160 AI Tools Extraction
artifacts.summary: Created source-backed tool records for QS rows 141-160, including USC AI software, Stockholm Copilot, Groningen Vibe, Liverpool/UCT/Vienna/Geneva/Barcelona Copilot, MSU enterprise AI tools, WashU secure AI tools, and York Gemini/NotebookLM/Copilot.
limitations: This tracker is not legal advice, not academic integrity advice, and not an official university statement unless a linked source is the university's own official page.
Records are tracker-derived summaries from public official sources and do not replace official university pages.
Schools without explicit tool-level official evidence were not expanded into named tool conclusions.
artifacts.sourceRightsPolicy: Tracker metadata is open licensed. Official source documents, page text, PDFs, and other source materials retain their original rights and terms.
